rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no relation to §11.183, which governs exemptions for associations assisting ambulatory health care centers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 11.183. ASSOCIATION PROVIDING ASSISTANCE TO AMBULATORY HEALTH CARE CENTERS.
_note: Rule cited (§11.183) is unrelated to the proposed change targeting §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption. No conflict exists.
